name: Constitutional layer: mechanize-or-descope decision (Track 3, H-CONSTITUTIONAL)

design_notes.what_this_feature_is: Phase-006 F-058: implement the operator's Track 3 mechanize-or-descope decision, taken per constitutional document (the v0.4.0 NMF-hybrid documentation-only policy surface). The feature IMPLEMENTS the recorded decisions; it does not make them.
design_notes.operator_decision_verbatim: Descope 7 as consumer-aspirational, mechanize the 2 cheap real wins (provenance SHA-pin check + capability-profiles 5↔5 check), then refresh the guide to match. Every first-contact surface becomes honest, and you gain 2 genuine enforcement checks with no vacuous or dormant tests.

per_document_disposition.MECHANIZE (2): standard/provenance_policy.md -- mechanize the SHA-pinned-Actions requirement as validate.sh check C14 (a new vlib_workflows_sha_pinned primitive scanning .github/workflows for any uses: ref not pinned to a 40-hex SHA; all current refs already pinned, so it goes green and locks in the convention), mark the attestation/audit-envelope/SLSA requirements consumer-aspirational. standard/capability_profiles.md -- mechanize the 5-profile <-> 5-AGF-role correspondence as check C15 (a new vlib_profiles_cover_roles primitive), mark the no-hard-coded-models / eval-gated-promotion / fallback requirements consumer-aspirational. Each hybrid carries `enforcement: partially-enforced` + a banner naming its enforced check.
per_document_disposition.DESCOPE consumer-aspirational (7): standard/ci_gates.md (the 10-gate MERGE_READY formula -- this repo ships no app to gate, in-repo mechanization impossible in principle), methodology/05_eval_and_trace.md, methodology/07_eval_gated_promotion.md, standard/mcp_policy.md, standard/permission_classes.md, standard/failure_modes.md, standard/cross_repo_governance.md -- each gets `enforcement: consumer-aspirational` + a body banner. tools/SKILL.md's cross-repo MUST-query line is softened to match cross_repo_governance's descope.
per_document_disposition.REFRESH (1): docs/guide/index.html -- the standard/ card omitted all 7 constitutional standard/ docs and the methodology card omitted 07/08; the refresh names them and marks the descoped ones consumer-aspirational so the live consumer first-contact surface reflects the outcome. Version anchor stays 0.7.0 (C10).
per_document_disposition.NOT selected: The optional permission_classes credential-policy CI-hygiene proxy was NOT chosen -- the operator authorized exactly the two named mechanize wins.

design_notes.honesty_rationale: The framework's Verifiable-Truth principle: a first-contact surface must not imply enforcement that does not exist. All 9 docs were documentation-only and all are injected into consumer payloads. Descoping marks the 7 unverifiable-in-a-single-repo-framework docs honestly; mechanizing the 2 adds real, cheap, non-vacuous checks (no dormancy: the SHA-pin check runs over real committed workflows, the profile-role check over the two real shipped docs).
design_notes.process_honesty: Single-session collapsed-role execution, disclosed-and-permitted by the AGF Orchestrator clause. The operator's verbatim H-CONSTITUTIONAL decision and the F-056 scope-flag acknowledgment were recorded in run_state BEFORE this implementation (coordination commit 8754465), per the gate-decision-before-acting principle this phase codified (NDEBT-018.2 / ecosystem/01 4.1). Anti-vacuity (E01) and confinement (E11) anchor to the phase base 756a158.

files_modify.purpose: two new vetted primitives: vlib_workflows_sha_pinned (C14), vlib_profiles_cover_roles (C15).
two new default-mode checks C14 (workflow SHA-pin) + C15 (capability-profile <-> AGF-role); SUMMARY 13 -> 15.
standing scratch discrimination for the two new primitives (pinned/complete PASS; unpinned/missing-role FAIL).
MECHANIZE hybrid: enforcement: partially-enforced + banner naming C14; 0.2.0 + change_log.
MECHANIZE hybrid: enforcement: partially-enforced + banner naming C15; 0.2.0 + change_log.
soften the cross-repo MUST-query line to match cross_repo_governance's descope.
refresh standard/ + methodology/ cards to name the constitutional docs (+ methodology 07/08) and mark descoped ones consumer-aspirational; 0.7.0 anchor unchanged.

non_goals: No runtime enforcement of the descoped semantics (RBAC/sandbox/MERGE_READY-gates/eval-thresholds/trace-envelopes/cross-repo-query) -- those are consumer-runtime by the operator's decision; the framework marks them aspirational, it does not simulate them.
No permission_classes credential-policy CI proxy (not selected by the operator).
No new schema and no change to the frontmatter schema -- the `enforcement` field rides additionalProperties:true.
No change to the meaning of any constitutional document beyond adding its enforcement-status marking; the normative bodies are unchanged.
No v0.8.0 tag -- that is F-059 (H-FRAMEWORK-RELEASE).

verification.acceptance_test: ANTI-VACUITY (phase base 756a158 = the F-056 merge): at base no constitutional doc carries an `enforcement:` field; validate.sh has neither the C14 workflow-pin nor the C15 profile-role check nor the two new verify_lib primitives; the guide's standard/ card omits the constitutional docs; ROADMAP Track 3 is unresolved; the default sweep was 13 checks.
verification.command:
set -e
for d in standard/ci_gates.md methodology/05_eval_and_trace.md methodology/07_eval_gated_promotion.md standard/mcp_policy.md standard/permission_classes.md standard/failure_modes.md standard/cross_repo_governance.md standard/provenance_policy.md standard/capability_profiles.md; do
  if git show 756a158:$d | grep -Eq '^enforcement:'; then echo "VACUITY: $d already has enforcement at base"; exit 1; fi
done
for tok in 'vlib_workflows_sha_pinned' 'vlib_profiles_cover_roles' 'check_c14' 'check_c15'; do
  if git show 756a158:tools/validate.sh | grep -Fq "$tok"; then echo "VACUITY: validate.sh already has $tok"; exit 1; fi
  if git show 756a158:tools/verify_lib.sh | grep -Fq "$tok"; then echo "VACUITY: verify_lib already has $tok"; exit 1; fi
done
git show 756a158:tools/validate.sh | grep -Fq 'SUMMARY: 13 passed' || git show 756a158:tools/validate.sh | grep -q 'passed'
if git show 756a158:docs/guide/index.html | grep -Fq 'capability_profiles'; then echo 'VACUITY: guide already lists constitutional docs'; exit 1; fi
echo 'E01 PASS: at base 756a158 no enforcement field, no C14/C15, guide omits constitutional docs, sweep was 13 (anti-vacuity)'

verification.acceptance_test: NDEBT/PROVENANCE MECHANIZE (C14): the workflow-SHA-pin check FAILs a scratch workflow whose action ref is a tag (not a 40-hex SHA) and PASSes this repo's real .github/workflows (all pinned) -- the vlib_workflows_sha_pinned primitive is load-bearing, not vacuous.
verification.command:
set -e
SB=$(mktemp -d)
case "$SB" in ""|"/"|"$PWD"|"$PWD"/*) echo unsafe; exit 1 ;; esac
trap 'rm -rf -- "$SB"' EXIT
. tools/verify_lib.sh
mkdir -p "$SB/wf"
printf 'jobs:\n  x:\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@v4\n' > "$SB/wf/bad.yml"
set +e; vlib_workflows_sha_pinned "$SB/wf" >/dev/null 2>&1; rc=$?; set -e
test "$rc" -ne 0
printf 'jobs:\n  x:\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683\n' > "$SB/wf/good.yml" && rm -f "$SB/wf/bad.yml"
set +e; vlib_workflows_sha_pinned "$SB/wf" >/dev/null 2>&1; rc2=$?; set -e
test "$rc2" -eq 0
set +e; vlib_workflows_sha_pinned .github/workflows >/dev/null 2>&1; rc3=$?; set -e
test "$rc3" -eq 0
echo 'E02 PASS: SHA-pin primitive FAILs a tag-pinned ref, PASSes a SHA-pinned ref and the real .github/workflows'

verification.acceptance_test: CAPABILITY-PROFILE MECHANIZE (C15): the profile<->role check PASSes the real standard/capability_profiles.md + standard/AGF.md pair and FAILs when a scratch profiles doc omits a profile identifier (evaluator-adversarial) -- the vlib_profiles_cover_roles primitive is load-bearing.
verification.command:
set -e
SB=$(mktemp -d)
case "$SB" in ""|"/"|"$PWD"|"$PWD"/*) echo unsafe; exit 1 ;; esac
trap 'rm -rf -- "$SB"' EXIT
. tools/verify_lib.sh
set +e; vlib_profiles_cover_roles standard/capability_profiles.md standard/AGF.md >/dev/null 2>&1; rc=$?; set -e
test "$rc" -eq 0
printf 'orchestrator-primary planner-creative generator-deterministic validator-structural\n' > "$SB/prof.md"
cp standard/AGF.md "$SB/agf.md"
set +e; vlib_profiles_cover_roles "$SB/prof.md" "$SB/agf.md" >/dev/null 2>&1; rc2=$?; set -e
test "$rc2" -ne 0
echo 'E03 PASS: profile-role primitive PASSes the real pair, FAILs a profiles doc missing the evaluator-adversarial profile'

verification.acceptance_test: SWEEP INTEGRATION: the two new checks join the default sweep (C14 workflow-pin, C15 profile-role); the default sweep is now 15/15 and green, and both new [C14]/[C15] verdict lines appear.
verification.command:
set -e
out=$(bash tools/validate.sh 2>&1); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0
printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fxq 'SUMMARY: 15 passed, 0 failed'
printf '%s\n' "$out" | grep -Fq '[C14]'
printf '%s\n' "$out" | grep -Fq '[C15]'
echo 'E04 PASS: default sweep 15/15 with [C14] and [C15] present'

verification.acceptance_test: PER-DOCUMENT DECIDED STATE (acceptance test 2): each of the 7 descoped docs carries `enforcement: consumer-aspirational` + a body banner; each of the 2 mechanized docs carries `enforcement: partially-enforced` + a banner naming the enforced check.
DOCS VERSIONED (C8): each of the 9 constitutional docs is at 0.2.0 with a matching change_log entry, so C8 (version-bump-vs-changelog) stays green.
SKILL.md SOFTENED: tools/SKILL.md no longer asserts the cross-repo query as an unconditional operative MUST; it points at the now-consumer-aspirational standard/cross_repo_governance.md honestly.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fq 'cross_repo_governance.md' tools/SKILL.md
grep -Eiq 'consumer-aspirational|aspirational|when operating across repositories|in an ecosystem deployment' tools/SKILL.md
if git show 756a158:tools/SKILL.md | grep -Fq 'the runtime MUST read the strategy repository'; then git diff 756a158..HEAD -- tools/SKILL.md | grep -q '^-.*MUST read the strategy repository'; fi
echo 'E07 PASS: SKILL.md cross-repo line softened to match the descope'

verification.acceptance_test: GUIDE REFRESHED (acceptance test 2, 'the guide reflects the outcome'): docs/guide/index.html now names the constitutional standard/ docs and methodology 07/08, and marks the descoped ones consumer-aspirational; the version anchor stays 0.7.0 (C10 green).
verification.command:
set -e
for tok in capability_profiles ci_gates mcp_policy failure_modes provenance_policy permission_classes cross_repo_governance; do
  grep -Fq "$tok" docs/guide/index.html || { echo "guide missing $tok"; exit 1; }
done
grep -Fq '07_eval_gated_promotion' docs/guide/index.html
grep -Fiq 'consumer-aspirational' docs/guide/index.html
grep -Fq '0.7.0' docs/guide/index.html
echo 'E08 PASS: guide names the constitutional docs + methodology 07/08, marks descoped ones aspirational, 0.7.0 anchor intact'

verification.acceptance_test: DECISION RECORDED (acceptance test 1): ROADMAP Track 3 is marked resolved by feature 058, and the operator's verbatim decision + per-document disposition is recorded in run_state (coordination commit) and this contract.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fiq 'resolved' docs/planning/ROADMAP.md
grep -Fq 'feature 058' docs/planning/ROADMAP.md
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
rs = json.load(open('.agent/run_state.json'))
ev = [h for h in rs['history'] if h.get('event') == 'operator_gate_decision' and 'H-CONSTITUTIONAL' in h.get('detail','')]
assert ev, 'no H-CONSTITUTIONAL gate-decision event in run_state'
d = ev[-1]['detail']
assert 'Descope 7 as consumer-aspirational' in d, 'verbatim decision not recorded'
for tok in ('provenance_policy','capability_profiles','ci_gates','eval_and_trace','eval_gated_promotion','mcp_policy','permission_classes','failure_modes','cross_repo_governance'):
    assert tok in d, 'missing per-doc disposition: ' + tok
print('run_state records the verbatim decision + all 9 per-document dispositions')
PY
echo 'E09 PASS: ROADMAP Track 3 resolved; verbatim decision + 9 per-doc dispositions recorded'

verification.acceptance_test: REGRESSION (rc-captured): default sweep 15/15, payload 11/11, self-test green (2 new primitive tests), e2e green.
verification.command:
set -e
out=$(bash tools/validate.sh 2>&1); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0; printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fxq 'SUMMARY: 15 passed, 0 failed'
out=$(bash tools/validate.sh --payload 2>&1); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0; printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fxq 'SUMMARY (payload mode): 11 passed, 0 failed'
out=$(bash tools/fixtures_self_test.sh 2>&1); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0; printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fq 'SELF-TEST OK'
bash tools/e2e_bootstrap_test.sh >/dev/null 2>&1
echo 'E10 PASS: sweep 15/15, payload 11/11, self-test OK, e2e green (rc=0 each)'

verification.acceptance_test: DELIVERABLE CONFINEMENT: the non-.agent changes across the branch (base 756a158..HEAD) are exactly the contracted deliverable files.
verification.command:
set -e
changed=$(git diff --name-only 756a158..HEAD | grep -v '^\.agent/' | LC_ALL=C sort | tr '\n' ' ')
expected='CHANGELOG.md docs/guide/index.html docs/planning/ROADMAP.md methodology/05_eval_and_trace.md methodology/07_eval_gated_promotion.md standard/capability_profiles.md standard/ci_gates.md standard/cross_repo_governance.md standard/failure_modes.md standard/mcp_policy.md standard/permission_classes.md standard/provenance_policy.md tools/SKILL.md tools/fixtures_self_test.sh tools/validate.sh tools/verify_lib.sh '
test "$changed" = "$expected"
echo 'E11 PASS: non-.agent changes are exactly the 16 contracted files'

set -e
sed -n '/## \[Unreleased\]/,/## \[0.7.0\]/p' CHANGELOG.md | grep -Fiq 'constitutional'
echo 'E12 PASS: CHANGELOG names the constitutional-layer decision'

evidence_convention: Each verification command's captured output is in .agent/evidence/058-verify-NN.txt, plus the consolidated .agent/evidence/058/verification.txt and 058/diff.patch (git diff 756a158..HEAD). Commands run from the repo root; anti-vacuity (E01) and confinement (E11) anchor to the phase base 756a158 (the F-056 merge), since the coordination commit 8754465 recording the operator decision sits between the base and this deliverable. Probes use mktemp -d scratch (methodology/02 Sec 11); expected-FAIL primitive calls capture rc explicitly (Sec 10(e)/NDEBT-019).

approvals.process_note: Operator-gated feature (H-CONSTITUTIONAL). The per-document decision was operator-authorized verbatim (recorded in run_state coordination commit 8754465 and design_notes.operator_decision_verbatim). The suite executes live with captured evidence; QA record .agent/qa/058.json documents the independent re-run.
